title: Clipboard Copy Button

statement.markdown:
markdown: # Clipboard Copy Button

## Description
Create a button that copies the text in the input field to the user's clipboard when clicked.

## Requirements
1. The button should be labeled "Copy to Clipboard".
2. The button should be enabled only when the input field contains text.
3. When the button is clicked, the text in the input field should be copied to the user's clipboard.
4. Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
5. Write all the code in JavaScript, HTML, and CSS (in separate files).
6. Ensure the button works in both desktop and mobile browsers.

constraints: Use the `navigator.clipboard` API to copy the text to the clipboard.
Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
Write all the code in JavaScript, HTML, and CSS (in separate files).
Ensure the button works in both desktop and mobile browsers.
